news_title: Mobile-health Network Solutions Unveils Proprietary Phi GPT, AI-Powered Health Companion
summary: Mobile-health Network Solutions (NASDAQ: MNDR)has launchedPhi GPT, a proprietary AI engine powering its new health companionAikowithin the company's Health Operating System. The AI-powered companion provides personalized healthcare guidance while maintaining strict data privacy through its closed ecosystem architecture.Early user feedback shows strong adoption metrics:70%of users value empathetic interactions,65%prefer simple interfaces, and80%seek personalized advice. The company is targeting a$660B+global digital health market, with AI healthcare market growing at>35% CAGR.The rollout began yesterday with limited users, expanding to all Singapore users within two weeks and global users within a month.
